mapper.select: select id, room_code, user_id, login_name, user_name, role, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from study_online_chat_room_user where room_code = #{roomCode} and user_id = #{userId} and status = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into study_online_chat_room_user (room_code, user_id, login_name, user_name, role, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{roomCode}, #{userId}, #{loginName}, #{userName}, #{role}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}) on duplicate key update login_name = values(login_name), user_name = values(user_name), role = case when status = '1' then values(role) else role end, status = '0', update_by = values(update_by), update_time = values(update_time)
mapper.update: update study_online_chat_room_user set role = #{role}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where room_code = #{roomCode} and user_id = #{userId} and status = '0'
mapper.select: select id, room_code, user_id, login_name, user_name, role, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from study_online_chat_room_user where room_code = #{roomCode} and status = '0' order by case role when 'owner' then 0 when 'admin' then 1 else 2 end asc, create_time asc, id asc
